languages.text: {n}Подплыв к сервитору, Эоганн с неожиданной тщательностью проходится ауспексом по всей его фигуре, пристально вглядываясь в показатели.{/n} "Это действительно так. Поведенческие паттерны этого сервитора изрядно деградировали из-за неразрешимого конфликта между сознанием и аугментикой. Неосмотрительно оставлять личность тому, чья воля полностью замещена императивами священного железа".

{n}Drifting toward the servitor, Eogunn runs his auspex across the servitor's entire frame with surprising meticulousness, staring closely at the readouts.{/n} "That is indeed true. The behavioural patterns of this servitor have severely degraded due to an irreconcilable conflict between consciousness and augmetics. It is imprudent to leave a personality within a vessel whose volition is entirely supplanted by the imperatives of the sacred iron."
languages.original_text: {n}Подплыв к сервитору, Эоганн с неожиданной тщательностью проходится ауспексом по всей его фигуре, пристально вглядываясь в показатели.{/n} "Это действительно так. The behavioural patterns of this servitor have severely degraded due to an irreconcilable conflict between consciousness and augmetics. languages.text: {n}Eogunn se acerca al servidor y recorre con su aúspex toda la unidad meticulosamente, estudiando a fondo las lecturas.{/n} «Efectivamente, es cierto. Los patrones de comportamiento del servidor han sufrido un grave deterioro a causa de un conflicto irreconciliable entre la consciencia y los auméticos. Es muy imprudente dejar estar una personalidad en un receptáculo cuya voluntad queda plenamente suplantada por los imperativos del sagrado metal».
languages.original_text: {n}Drifting toward the servitor, Eogunn runs his auspex across the servitor's entire frame with surprising meticulousness, staring closely at the readouts.{/n} "That is indeed true. The behavioural patterns of this servitor have severely degraded due to an irreconcilable conflict between consciousness and augmetics. It is imprudent to leave a personality within a vessel whose volition is entirely supplanted by the imperatives of the sacred iron."

Los patrones de comportamiento del servidor han sufrido un grave deterioro a causa de un conflicto irreconciliable entre la consciencia y los auméticos. Es muy imprudente dejar estar una personalidad en un receptáculo cuya voluntad queda plenamente suplantada por los imperativos del sagrado metal».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡飘向那台机仆，以惊人的细致用俄歇矩阵扫描了它的全身，同时目光紧盯着读数。{/n}“确实如此。由于意识与植入物间存在不可调和的冲突，这台机仆的行为模式已严重退化。将人格留在这种载体中并不明智，因为其意志早已被圣铁的指令彻底取代。”
languages.original_text: {n}Drifting toward the servitor, Eogunn runs his auspex across the servitor's entire frame with surprising meticulousness, staring closely at the readouts.{/n} "That is indeed true. The behavioural patterns of this servitor have severely degraded due to an irreconcilable conflict between consciousness and augmetics. It is imprudent to leave a personality within a vessel whose volition is entirely supplanted by the imperatives of the sacred iron."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡飘向那台机仆，以惊人的细致用俄歇矩阵扫描了它的全身，同时目光紧盯着读数。{/n}“确实如此。由于意识与植入物间存在不可调和的冲突，这台机仆的行为模式已严重退化。将人格留在这种载体中并不明智，因为其意志早已被圣铁的指令彻底取代。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn schwebt auf den Servitor zu, um diesen mit überraschender Akribie zu untersuchen, und studiert seine Messungen.{/n} "Das ist in der Tat richtig. Die Verhaltensmuster dieses Servitors haben unter einem unvereinbaren Konflikt zwischen Bewusstsein und Augmentationen ernsthaft gelitten. Es wäre unbedacht, eine Persönlichkeit in einem Gefäß zu belassen, dessen Wille von den Befehlen des heiligen Eisens gänzlich verdrängt wird."
languages.original_text: {n}Drifting toward the servitor, Eogunn runs his auspex across the servitor's entire frame with surprising meticulousness, staring closely at the readouts.{/n} "That is indeed true. The behavioural patterns of this servitor have severely degraded due to an irreconcilable conflict between consciousness and augmetics. It is imprudent to leave a personality within a vessel whose volition is entirely supplanted by the imperatives of the sacred iron."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn schwebt auf den Servitor zu, um diesen mit überraschender Akribie zu untersuchen, und studiert seine Messungen.{/n} "Das ist in der Tat richtig. Die Verhaltensmuster dieses Servitors haben unter einem unvereinbaren Konflikt zwischen Bewusstsein und Augmentationen ernsthaft gelitten. Es wäre unbedacht, eine Persönlichkeit in einem Gefäß zu belassen, dessen Wille von den Befehlen des heiligen Eisens gänzlich verdrängt wird."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn se rapproche du servitor et effleure ses contours de ses auspex avec une minutie surprenante, tout en scrutant attentivement les résultats de son analyse.{/n} « Je confirme. Les schémas comportementaux de ce servitor ont été gravement altérés en raison d'un conflit irréconciliable entre sa conscience et ses augmétiques. Il est imprudent d'enfermer une personnalité au sein d'une enveloppe dont la volonté est entièrement éclipsée par les impératifs du métal sacré. »
languages.original_text: {n}Drifting toward the servitor, Eogunn runs his auspex across the servitor's entire frame with surprising meticulousness, staring closely at the readouts.{/n} "That is indeed true. The behavioural patterns of this servitor have severely degraded due to an irreconcilable conflict between consciousness and augmetics. It is imprudent to leave a personality within a vessel whose volition is entirely supplanted by the imperatives of the sacred iron."

Il est imprudent d'enfermer une personnalité au sein d'une enveloppe dont la volonté est entièrement éclipsée par les impératifs du métal sacré. »

languages.text: {n}Hizmetöre doğru süzülen Eogunn, okumalara yakından bakarak uzgörenini hizmetörün gövdesinde şaşırtıcı bir titizlikle gezdiriyor.{/n} "Bu gerçekten de doğru. Bu hizmetörün davranış kalıpları, bilinç ve ogmetikler arasındaki uzlaşılmaz bir çatışma nedeniyle ciddi şekilde bozulmuş. İradesi bütünüyle kutsal demirin emirleriyle değiştirilmiş bir bedenin içinde kişilik bırakmak ihtiyatsızlıktır."
languages.original_text: {n}Drifting toward the servitor, Eogunn runs his auspex across the servitor's entire frame with surprising meticulousness, staring closely at the readouts.{/n} "That is indeed true. The behavioural patterns of this servitor have severely degraded due to an irreconcilable conflict between consciousness and augmetics. It is imprudent to leave a personality within a vessel whose volition is entirely supplanted by the imperatives of the sacred iron."

traits.locale_text: {n}Hizmetöre doğru süzülen Eogunn, okumalara yakından bakarak uzgörenini hizmetörün gövdesinde şaşırtıcı bir titizlikle gezdiriyor.{/n} "Bu gerçekten de doğru. Bu hizmetörün davranış kalıpları, bilinç ve ogmetikler arasındaki uzlaşılmaz bir çatışma nedeniyle ciddi şekilde bozulmuş. İradesi bütünüyle kutsal demirin emirleriyle değiştirilmiş bir bedenin içinde kişilik bırakmak ihtiyatsızlıktır."

languages.text: {n}エオグンはサービトの方へ近づき、サービトの全身を精密な眼で観察しながら、彼のオウペックスをサービトの体に走らせる。{/n}「確かにそうである。このサービトの行動パターンは、意識と増幅器との間に生じた不可解な矛盾によって、著しく低下している。聖なる鉄の命令に完全に支配された意志を持つ容器の中に、人格を残しておくのは危険である。」

It is imprudent to leave a personality within a vessel whose volition is entirely supplanted by the imperatives of the sacred iron."
